rationale: Ground truth closes #4891 as a duplicate of #4808, pointing to #4809 for the full triage; Y reaches exactly this conclusion, cites the #4809 tracking issue, and correctly hedges the one unverifiable claim (whether #4808's fix actually landed on main, noting it shows mergedAt null). X never frames this as a duplicate/tracking issue, and instead confidently asserts the fix is 'already removed on current main tip' complete with a fabricated-sounding code comment quote — a confident claim that Y's own research suggests may be false since #4808 never merged. X's root-cause/fix mechanics are accurate but the disposition reasoning and unverified assertions make it materially weaker.
